entry.title: Climber section revisions
entry.summary: Additional clarifications have been added for machining unpatterned box tube and for using patterned box tube.
entry.content: Additional clarifications have been added for machining unpatterned box tube and for using patterned box tube.

entry.title: Everybot released!
entry.summary: With the Everybot reveal, the following resources have become available:
entry.content:
With the Everybot reveal, the following resources have become available:


  • Manual with sections on the chassis, roller claw, climb and electrical layout
  • CAD
  • Code
  • Bill of materials

We hope to release our ballast and bumpers sections by the end of the week. Additionally there are some programming specific resources (deploying code, imaging the roboRIO, etc.) on the way!
